name: clear-comments
description: Write code comments in anandyandawang's house style (used across paywithextend repos like astrada-integrator, wex-integrator, and fis-integrator). Comment sparingly — the code says what, a comment says why. Vocabulary is `// TODO(EX-####):` (always with the unblocking condition) and `// Note:` (an intentional, non-obvious decision); no FIXME/HACK/XXX, no `/* */` block comments, no commented-out code, no restating the line below. Backtick every code identifier. KDoc is a mini-spec for public ports and complex services; inline `//` annotates mapping tables with the source system's label; tests get scenario/section banners. Applies automatically whenever Claude writes or edits code comments.
